questions.question_text: Students 'engage with' virtual patients to practise surgical procedures. What does 'engage with' mean?

options.text: To observe from a distance without any direct interaction
To actively participate in and interact directly with something
To study and read about something without trying it
To evaluate and judge the quality of a process or outcome

questions.explanation_ar: engage with تعني يتفاعل مع ويُشارك بنشاط، أي الانخراط المباشر والفاعل مع شيء ما بدلاً من مجرد مراقبته.

questions.question_text: Engineering students 'manipulate' three-dimensional models of machinery using VR. What does 'manipulate' mean?

options.text: To observe and study something without touching or changing it
To handle and control something in a skilful and precise way
To build and create something entirely from scratch
To delete and remove elements from a digital model

questions.explanation_ar: manipulate تعني يُمسك ويتحكم بمهارة، أي التعامل مع شيء ما بطريقة دقيقة ومتحكّم بها لتحقيق هدف معين.

questions.question_text: VR creates a 'dramatic' improvement in student learning outcomes compared to traditional methods. What does 'dramatic' mean?

options.text: Gradual and barely noticeable over a very long period
Very sudden, striking, and impossible to ignore
Consistent and steady without any significant variation
Temporary and likely to reverse itself after a short time

questions.explanation_ar: dramatic تعني مثيرة للانتباه وكبيرة بشكل لافت، أي تغيير واضح وبارز لا يمكن تجاهله.

questions.question_text: The high cost of VR equipment remains a 'barrier' for many institutions. What does 'barrier' mean?

options.text: An advantage that helps institutions adopt new technology faster
Something that blocks progress or prevents achieving a goal
A physical wall that separates different areas of a hospital
A training programme for staff learning to use new equipment

questions.explanation_ar: barrier تعني حاجز وعقبة، أي شيء يُعيق التقدم ويمنع تحقيق هدف أو الوصول إليه بشكل فعّال.

questions.question_text: VR is seen as a 'supplement' to conventional teaching approaches, not a replacement. What does 'supplement' mean?

options.text: Something that completely replaces and eliminates what existed before
Something added to enhance or complete something that already exists
Something that competes directly against existing methods
Something that reduces the effectiveness of an existing approach

questions.explanation_ar: supplement تعني مُكمِّل ومضاف، أي شيء يُعزّز ما هو موجود دون أن يُحلّه، بل يُضيف إليه قيمة إضافية.

questions.question_text: When VR 'facilitates' learning, it makes the learning process more difficult and creates additional obstacles for students.
questions.explanation_ar: خطأ. facilitate تعني يُيسِّر ويُسهّل، أي جعل عملية ما أكثر سهولة وفعالية — وهو النقيض التام لإضافة العقبات.

questions.question_text: Statistics described as 'compelling' in a research paper provide strong evidence that is hard to ignore or dismiss.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. compelling تعني مقنع وجذاب ويصعب تجاهله، أي أن الأدلة قوية بما يكفي لإجبار الناس على الانتباه إليها.

questions.question_text: Therapists _____ VR environments to treat patients with phobias by exposing them to controlled virtual scenarios.
questions.explanation_ar: employ تعني يستخدم بشكل منهجي ومقصود، أي توظيف أداة أو أسلوب معين لتحقيق هدف محدد بطريقة احترافية.

questions.question_text: Which sentence uses 'whose' correctly as a relative pronoun?

options.text: The surgeon whose performed the operation trained with VR.
The patient whose pain level dropped significantly was impressed.
The headset whose I borrowed was very comfortable.
The hospital whose is in Riyadh has a VR unit.

questions.explanation_ar: whose يُستخدم للملكية ويحل محل his/her/their/its في الجملة الوصفية. الخيار b صحيح: pain level = the patient's pain level.

questions.question_text: Which sentence uses 'where' correctly as a relative pronoun?

options.text: The hospital where the surgeon works is in Riyadh.
The surgeon where invented this method won an award.
The research where was published showed great results.
The headset where costs $500 is very popular now.

questions.explanation_ar: where يُستخدم في الجمل الوصفية للإشارة إلى مكان (كالمستشفى). الخيار a صحيح لأن 'hospital' مكان يُناسبه where.

questions.question_text: In which sentence is 'when' used correctly as a relative pronoun?

options.text: The year when VR first appeared in hospitals was 2010.
The doctor when trained with VR performed better.
The device when costs less will be more widely used.
The patient when the headset helped was very happy.

questions.explanation_ar: when يُستخدم في الجمل الوصفية للإشارة إلى وقت أو زمن (كالسنة). الخيار a صحيح لأن 'year' زمن يُناسبه when.

questions.question_text: Combine: 'The report was published last year. The report changed VR policy in hospitals.' Use a relative clause.

options.text: The report which published last year changed VR policy.
The report that was published last year changed VR policy.
The report, published last year, that changed VR policy.
The report who published last year changed VR policy.

questions.explanation_ar: الجملة الوصفية توحّد الجملتين: 'that was published last year' تصف التقرير وتُحدده. الخيار b صحيح — report شيء لذا نستخدم that/which.

questions.question_text: The sentence 'The centre where Dr. Al-Mahmoud works uses virtual reality for therapy' uses 'where' correctly.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. where يُستخدم للإشارة إلى مكان (centre/مركز)، وهو الاستخدام الصحيح هنا لوصف المكان الذي تعمل فيه الدكتورة.

questions.question_text: Match each relative pronoun to the type of noun it introduces in these sentences.

left_items: The surgeon who trained with VR performed better.
The hospital where VR therapy is offered is world-class.
The headset whose screen broke was sent for repair.
The moment when VR entered healthcare changed medicine.
right_items: introduces a time expression (year / moment / period)

correct_answer.left: The surgeon who trained with VR performed better.
The hospital where VR therapy is offered is world-class.
The headset whose screen broke was sent for repair.
The moment when VR entered healthcare changed medicine.
correct_answer.right: introduces a time expression (year / moment / period)

questions.explanation_ar: الضمائر الوصفية: who للأشخاص، where للأماكن، whose للملكية، when للزمن. كل ضمير يُستخدم حسب نوع الاسم الذي يصفه.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, what limitation does VR technology still face that needs to be addressed?

options.text: It cannot yet be used for any educational purpose in schools
High equipment costs remain a barrier for many institutions
Only doctors can use VR; students are not permitted access
VR only works in hospitals and cannot be used in universities

questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن التكلفة المرتفعة للأجهزة لا تزال عقبة أمام كثير من المؤسسات خاصةً في المناطق النامية.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, what do VR therapy sessions in mental health primarily help patients do?

options.text: Forget their problems by distracting them with entertainment
Confront phobias and anxiety disorders in controlled safe settings
Replace medication for all types of psychological conditions
Record their thoughts and feelings in a virtual diary format

questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن المعالجين في منطقة الخليج يستخدمون بيئات الواقع الافتراضي لمساعدة المرضى على مواجهة الرهاب وإدارة القلق في بيئات آمنة ومتحكَّم بها.

questions.question_text: Passage B says patients 'often lose track of time' during VR sessions. What does this suggest about the technology?

options.text: VR sessions are too short to be effective for pain management
The VR experience is so engaging that it fully absorbs patient attention
Patients fall asleep during VR sessions due to relaxing sounds
The technology has a negative effect on patients' memory

questions.explanation_ar: يُضمّن فقدان المرضى للإحساس بالوقت أن تجربة الواقع الافتراضي بالغة الاستيعاب لدرجة تستوعب انتباههم الكامل، مما يتيح للطاقم الطبي إكمال الإجراءات بأقل معاناة.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, VR is expected to include virtual consultations and remote surgical guidance as standard practice in the future.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. توقّع خبراء الطب وفق ما ذكره النص أن الاستشارات الافتراضية والتوجيه الجراحي عن بُعد وأدوات التشخيص بالذكاء الاصطناعي ستصبح ممارسةً معيارية مستقبلاً.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, research indicates students retain _____ percent of information learned through VR experiences.
questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن الدراسات أثبتت أن الطلاب يحتفظون بـ 75% من المعلومات المكتسبة عبر تجارب الواقع الافتراضي.

questions.question_text: Match each VR application area from both passages to its specific example.

right_items: students explore ancient civilizations without leaving their classroom
therapists expose patients to controlled virtual fear scenarios safely
burn victims at Dubai and Riyadh centres report significantly reduced pain
surgical residents train with simulations and perform 230% better

correct_answer.right: burn victims at Dubai and Riyadh centres report significantly reduced pain
surgical residents train with simulations and perform 230% better
therapists expose patients to controlled virtual fear scenarios safely
students explore ancient civilizations without leaving their classroom

questions.explanation_ar: تناول النصان تطبيقات متعددة للواقع الافتراضي: إدارة الألم، التدريب الجراحي، علاج الرهاب، والتعليم الجامعي — كل تطبيق له مثال محدد من النصين.
